code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_tok = false
mut neg = false
mut val = 0
mut has_digit = false

while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  let b = if is_end
    0
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  end
  let is_ws = is_end or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
  if is_ws
    if in_tok and has_digit
      mut v = val
      if neg
        v = -v
      end
      if v > 0
        sum = sum + v * 2
      end
    end
    in_tok = false
    neg = false
    val = 0
    has_digit = false
  else
    in_tok = true
    if b == 45
      neg = true
    else if b == 43
      in_tok = true
    else
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

print("result=#{sum}")
